begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql:
select sum(row_memno) over ( partition by tab.member_group_control order by tab.member_group_control,tab.member_group_no,tab.loan_requestment_no) as rowno ,tab.* from ( select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , decode(lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,null,1)over(order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno, sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) AS requestment_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) AS membername , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark , sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first int_approx, sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share , sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit , sc_lon_m_loan_request.contract_code , ( select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description from sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj where trim(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type) = trim(sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) as loan_objective_description, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) AS member_control_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first,
NVL(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long,'ไม่ได้ระบุ') position_long, sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_com_m_branch, si_security_user, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( trim(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ) = trim(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_br = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) AND (sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) AND (sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' AND (sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' ) AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code and sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id /*WHERE*/ )tab

r_ktm_udon_loan_req_atm_nest_old_loan.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.sequence_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )
